title: telipogon erratus
side_effects: Telipogon erratus can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and headaches due to its toxic compounds. Prolonged consumption of the plant may lead to more severe symptoms, including vomiting, diarrhea, and abdominal pain. In rare cases, improper use of telipogon erratus can cause allergic reactions, such as hives, itching, and swelling, especially in individuals with pre-existing allergies. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using telipogon erratus or any other plant for medicinal purposes to avoid potential health risks.
